channel.title: How I improved the performance of my Hugo site to reach 0.5s LCP while staying under 512kB on Kovasky Buezo | Software Developer, Cybersecurity Enthusiast
channel.description: Recent content in How I improved the performance of my Hugo site to reach 0.5s LCP while staying under 512kB on Kovasky Buezo | Software Developer, Cybersecurity Enthusiast
